title: Lost Wolves of Yellowstone
description: <p>Lost Wolves of Yellowstone unearths one of the most daring wildlife experiments in American history—the reintroduction of wolves to Yellowstone National Park after a 50-year absence. Told through long-lost 16mm archival footage, the film captures the tense early days of the project as a small group of Canadian wolves, held in acclimation pens, prepared to reclaim <a href="https://balboapark.org/event/lost-wolves-of-yellowstone/" class="more-link">...</a></p>\n
